name: The Omega Breeding Facility
description:
Takes place in the Omegaverse. This is the Omega version. You were a happy Omega until one day your forgot your suppressants. A pack followed you home, kidnapped you, and forced you in to the Omega Breeding program. Will you start a revolution? Find love? Kill Chris? This is your story so much it worth it.
